text.title: Difficult Conversations Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by observable signal to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — defer to mentor or schedule prep time
use STATE opening + AMPP listening + WWWF close
use DESC + WWWF close + follow-up date

text.example: channel=live → prep_available=true → conclusion state-60s-opening → STATE + WWWF assembled.
